question: List all the artists name in the database.
nl_response: The database contains a wide range of artists, including AC/DC, Accept, Aerosmith, Alanis Morissette, Alice In Chains, and many others.

question: List the names of the first 5 tracks.
nl_response: The first 5 tracks are "For Those About To Rock (We Salute You)", "Balls to the Wall", "Fast As a Shark", "Restless and Wild", and "Princess of the Dawn".

question: Count the number of customers located in the USA.
nl_response: There are 13 customers located in the USA.
sql_generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Customer WHERE Country = 'USA'

question: Find all invoices for the customer with ID 1.
nl_response: There are 7 invoices for the customer with ID 1.

question: List each album title along with the artist's name.
nl_response: The database contains a list of over 50 albums along with their respective artists.
sql_generated: SELECT Album.Title, Artist.Name FROM Album JOIN Artist ON Album.ArtistId = Artist.ArtistId

question: How many tracks belong to the 'Rock' genre?
nl_response: There are 1297 tracks that belong to the 'Rock' genre.
sql_generated: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Track AS T JOIN Genre AS G ON T.GenreId = G.GenreId WHERE G.Name = 'Rock'

question: Show the total revenue generated from each country.
nl_response: The total revenue generated spans multiple countries, with the USA leading at $523.06, followed by Canada at $303.96, France at $195.10, Brazil at $190.10, and Portugal at $77.24.
sql_generated: SELECT BillingCountry, SUM(Total) AS TotalRevenue FROM Invoice GROUP BY BillingCountry

question: Find the total number of items sold for each media type.
nl_response: The total number of items sold includes 1976 MPEG audio files, 146 protected AAC audio files, 111 protected MPEG-4 video files, and 7 AAC audio files (3 regular and 4 purchased).
sql_generated:
SELECT MediaType.Name, COUNT(*) AS TotalItemsSold
FROM MediaType
JOIN Track ON MediaType.MediaTypeId = Track.MediaTypeId
JOIN InvoiceLine ON Track.TrackId = InvoiceLine.TrackId
GROUP BY MediaType.Name

question: List the first and last names of all employees who are Sales Support Agents.
nl_response: The Sales Support Agents are Jane Peacock, Margaret Park, and Steve Johnson.
sql_generated: SELECT FirstName, LastName FROM Employee WHERE Title = 'Sales Support Agent'

question: List the top 5 customers who have spent the most money in total.
nl_response: The top 5 customers who have spent the most money in total are Helena Holý with $49.62, Richard Cunningham with $47.62, Luis Rojas with $46.62, Ladislav Kovács with $45.62, and Hugh O'Reilly with $45.62.
sql_generated:
SELECT c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName, SUM(i.Total) AS TotalSpent
FROM Customer c
JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId = i.CustomerId
GROUP BY c.CustomerId, c.FirstName, c.LastName
ORDER BY TotalSpent DESC
LIMIT 5

question: Which artist has the most tracks in the database? Give the name and count.
nl_response: Iron Maiden has the most tracks in the database with 213 tracks.
sql_generated: SELECT T2.Name, COUNT(T3.TrackId) AS TrackCount FROM Album AS T1 JOIN Artist AS T2 ON T1.ArtistId = T2.ArtistId JOIN Track AS T3 ON T1.AlbumId = T3.AlbumId GROUP BY T2.Name ORDER BY TrackCount DESC LIMIT 1

question: Which genres have more than 100 tracks? List the genre name and count.
nl_response: Rock has 1297 tracks, Jazz has 130 tracks, Metal has 374 tracks, Alternative & Punk has 332 tracks, and Latin has 579 tracks.
sql_generated:
SELECT G.Name, COUNT(T.TrackId) AS TrackCount
FROM Genre G
JOIN Track T ON G.GenreId = T.GenreId
GROUP BY G.GenreId
HAVING COUNT(T.TrackId) > 100

question: Calculate the average track length in seconds for each genre.
nl_response: The average track lengths vary significantly across genres, ranging from approximately 134.64 seconds to 2625.55 seconds.
sql_generated: SELECT GenreId, AVG(Milliseconds / 1000.0) AS AverageLengthInSeconds FROM Track GROUP BY GenreId

question: Identify the artist who has earned the most revenue from customers in Canada.
nl_response: Metallica has earned the most revenue from customers in Canada.
sql_generated: SELECT T3.Name FROM Invoice AS T1 JOIN Customer AS T2 ON T1.CustomerId = T2.CustomerId JOIN InvoiceLine AS T4 ON T1.InvoiceId = T4.InvoiceId JOIN Track AS T5 ON T4.TrackId = T5.TrackId JOIN Album AS T6 ON T5.AlbumId = T6.AlbumId JOIN Artist AS T3 ON T6.ArtistId = T3.ArtistId WHERE T2.Country = 'Canada' GROUP BY T3.Name ORDER BY SUM(T1.Total) DESC LIMIT 1
